title: Year 10 Social Studies: Cultural Documentary
subject: Social Studies
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of social studies concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern social studies challenges

Engage with community perspectives on social studies issues

resources: Cultural knowledge databases and social studies resources
Traditional knowledge holders and social studies experts
Environmental monitoring tools and social studies software
Community engagement platforms and social studies forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and social studies models
assessment: Community engagement reflection on social studies applications
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
